name: Veal Parmigiana
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pound Veal Cutlets, or chicken and sliced thin (and pounded -- except for fish)
Grated cheese -- and slices of Mozzarella (1 per cutlet)
recipeInstructions:
Dip each cutlet into egg, breadcrumbs, and quickly into egg again. Put into hot, but not smoking olive oil.
(If the oil is too hot, cutlets will burn before they cook; if the oil is not hot enough, cutlets will soak up oil and breading will not stick.)
Cook each one about 3-4 minutes on each side until golden brown. Drain well on paper towels or brown bags.
When all cutlets are done, arrange in a shallow baking dish. Ladle sauce on top of each one to mostly cover it, but don’t let it swim in sauce. Generously sprinkle with grated cheese. Top with mozzarella slices and bake in oven for about 20 minutes until cheese melts.
Serve hot with pasta on the side.
